commit_message:
Add build scripts & CI configuration Add build scripts & CI configuration This PR contains scripts that are able to build an archlinux-arm image with the tools in this repository installed. Moreover a CI config for gitlab ci is present, which builds an image for every commit and checks, wether the image boots in the xilinx-qemu. It should close https://lab.apertus.org/T697.

The pipeline for this PR can be found at https://gitlab.com/nein/beta-software/pipelines/13506162. 

However, some thi

The pipeline for this PR can be found at https://gitlab.com/nein/beta-software/pipelines/13506162. 

However, some thi
examples.patch:
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ cmv_hist3.static : cmv_hist3.o
 
 install:
 	$(STRIP) $(TARGETS)
-	cp -va $(TARGETS) /root/
+	for TARGET in $(TARGETS); do ln -sf $(pwd)/$$TARGET /usr/local/bin/axiom-$$TARGET; done
 
 clean:
 	rm -f *.o
examples.before_code:
.SUFFIXES: .c .o .asm .hex .bin

TARGETS = cmv_hist3 

all : $(TARGETS)

CC = gcc
STRIP = strip
CFLAGS += -ggdb -Wall -std=gnu99 -O2
LDFLAGS += -lm

cmv_hist3.static : cmv_hist3.o
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -static $(LDFLAGS) -o $@ $^

install:
	$(STRIP) $(TARGETS)
	cp -va $(TARGETS) /root/

clean:
	rm -f *.o
	rm -f $(TARGETS)
	rm -f *~ *.orig
examples.after_code:
.SUFFIXES: .c .o .asm .hex .bin

TARGETS = cmv_hist3 

all : $(TARGETS)

CC = gcc
STRIP = strip
CFLAGS += -ggdb -Wall -std=gnu99 -O2
LDFLAGS += -lm

cmv_hist3.static : cmv_hist3.o
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -static $(LDFLAGS) -o $@ $^

install:
	$(STRIP) $(TARGETS)
	for TARGET in $(TARGETS); do ln -sf $(pwd)/$$TARGET /usr/local/bin/axiom-$$TARGET; done

clean:

	rm -f $(TARGETS)
	rm -f *~ *.orig

+	for TARGET in $(TARGETS); do ln -sf $(pwd)/$$TARGET /usr/local/bin/axiom-$$TARGET; done

examples.before_code:
.SUFFIXES: .c .o .asm .hex .bin

TARGETS = cmv_perf3

all : $(TARGETS)

CC = gcc
STRIP = strip
CFLAGS += -ggdb -Wall -std=gnu99 -O2
LDFLAGS += -lm

cmv_perf3.o : cmv_perf3.c cmv_reg.h scn_reg.h

cmv_perf3 : cmv_perf3.o
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -lrt -o $@ $^

install:
	$(STRIP) $(TARGETS)
	cp -va $(TARGETS) /root/

clean:
	rm -f *.o
	rm -f $(TARGETS)
	rm -f *~ *.orig

examples.commit_message:
Add build scripts & CI configuration Add build scripts & CI configuration This PR contains scripts that are able to build an archlinux-arm image with the tools in this repository installed. Moreover a CI config for gitlab ci is present, which builds an image for every commit and checks, wether the image boots in the xilinx-qemu. It should close https://lab.apertus.org/T697.

The pipeline for this PR can be found at https://gitlab.com/nein/beta-software/pipelines/13506162. 

However, some thi
examples.patch:
@@ -1,9 +1,7 @@
 
 .SUFFIXES: .c .o .asm .hex .bin
 
-TARGETS = cmv_train4 cmv_snap3 cmv_train3 cmv_hist3 cmv_perf3 lut_conf3 cmv_rcn3 pmem mimg
-TARGETS += cmv_snap3.static cmv_hist3.static lut_conf3.static
-TARGETS += smbget pong track paint
+TARGETS = cmv_snap3
 
 all : $(TARGETS)
 
@@ -34,7 +32,7 @@ lut_conf3.static : lut_conf3.o
 
 install:
 	$(STRIP) $(TARGETS)
-	cp -va $(TARGETS) /root/
+	for TARGET in $(TARGETS); do ln -sf $(pwd)/$$TARGET /usr/local/bin/axiom-$$TARGET; done
 
 clean:
 	rm -f *.o
examples.before_code:
.SUFFIXES: .c .o .asm .hex .bin

TARGETS = cmv_train4 cmv_snap3 cmv_train3 cmv_hist3 cmv_perf3 lut_conf3 cmv_rcn3 pmem mimg
TARGETS += cmv_snap3.static cmv_hist3.static lut_conf3.static
TARGETS += smbget pong track paint

all : $(TARGETS)

CC = gcc
STRIP = strip
CFLAGS += -ggdb -Wall -std=gnu99 -O2
LDFLAGS += -lm -lpthread

cmv_train3.o : cmv_train3.c cmv_reg.h
cmv_snap3.o : cmv_snap3.c cmv_reg.h scn_reg.h
cmv_perf3.o : cmv_perf3.c cmv_reg.h scn_reg.h
cmv_rcn3.o : cmv_rcn3.c cmv_reg.h scn_reg.h

cmv_perf3 : cmv_perf3.o
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -lrt -o $@ $^

pong : pong.o
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -lrt -lm -o $@ $^

cmv_snap3.static : cmv_snap3.o
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -static $(LDFLAGS) -o $@ $^

cmv_hist3.static : cmv_hist3.o
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -static $(LDFLAGS) -o $@ $^

lut_conf3.static : lut_conf3.o
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -static -o $@ $^ $(LDFLAGS)

install:
	$(STRIP) $(TARGETS)
	cp -va $(TARGETS) /root/

clean:
	rm -f *.o
	rm -f $(TARGETS)
	rm -f *~ *.orig

# launching multiple copies of cmv_snap3 should just work
# without locking up the entire system
# (it should capture 3 images, in any order, without conflicts)
cmv_snap3_sem_test:
	. /root/cmv.func; fil_reg 15 0
	for i in `seq 100`; do \
		./cmv_snap3 -2 -b -e 1ms -z & \
		./cmv_snap3 -2 -b -e 10ms -z & \
		./cmv_snap3 -2 -b -e 100ms -z ; \
		wait; \
	done

cmv_snap3_asm: cmv_snap3.o
	objdump -d -M reg-names-raw --section=.dump_asm cmv_snap3.o

# 	block normal .c -> .o
# %.o : %.c
examples.after_code:
.SUFFIXES: .c .o .asm .hex .bin

TARGETS = cmv_snap3

all : $(TARGETS)

CC = gcc
STRIP = strip
CFLAGS += -ggdb -Wall -std=gnu99 -O2
LDFLAGS += -lm -lpthread

cmv_train3.o : cmv_train3.c cmv_reg.h
cmv_snap3.o : cmv_snap3.c cmv_reg.h scn_reg.h
cmv_perf3.o : cmv_perf3.c cmv_reg.h scn_reg.h
cmv_rcn3.o : cmv_rcn3.c cmv_reg.h scn_reg.h

cmv_perf3 : cmv_perf3.o
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -lrt -o $@ $^

pong : pong.o
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -lrt -lm -o $@ $^

cmv_snap3.static : cmv_snap3.o
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -static $(LDFLAGS) -o $@ $^

cmv_hist3.static : cmv_hist3.o
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -static $(LDFLAGS) -o $@ $^

lut_conf3.static : lut_conf3.o
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) -static -o $@ $^ $(LDFLAGS)

install:
	$(STRIP) $(TARGETS)
	for TARGET in $(TARGETS); do ln -sf $(pwd)/$$TARGET /usr/local/bin/axiom-$$TARGET; done

clean:
	rm -f *.o
	rm -f $(TARGETS)
	rm -f *~ *.orig

# launching multiple copies of cmv_snap3 should just work
# without locking up the entire system
# (it should capture 3 images, in any order, without conflicts)
cmv_snap3_sem_test:
	. /root/cmv.func; fil_reg 15 0
	for i in `seq 100`; do \
		./cmv_snap3 -2 -b -e 1ms -z & \
		./cmv_snap3 -2 -b -e 10ms -z & \
		./cmv_snap3 -2 -b -e 100ms -z ; \
		wait; \
	done

cmv_snap3_asm: cmv_snap3.o
	objdump -d -M reg-names-raw --section=.dump_asm cmv_snap3.o

# 	block normal .c -> .o
# %.o : %.c
